raw_response: Based on the context provided earlier, high-speed films (Option A), intensifying screens (Option B), decreasing kilovoltage peak (kVp) values (Option D), and lead aprons (Option C) all serve different purposes aimed at reducing patient radiation dose independently of the natural advantages offered by intraoral radiographs themselves being limited in their scope.
